_README: Reference template for the MCP servers this stack uses. The install.sh script wires the ones you choose via `claude mcp add` — you usually don't edit this file by hand. REQUIRED: exa (public), agentmemory, context7. OPTIONAL: searxng, jina. Never commit a copy with real keys filled in (this template stays key-free; the public Exa/Context7 endpoints need no key).

exa._what: Public/free Exa web search & fetch (rate-limited hosted endpoint, no key). Powers ultradeep + market-scout research.

agentmemory._what: Cross-session memory (local, noop mode = zero-LLM, BM25+embedding hybrid). Auto-launches per session.

context7._what: Public Context7 library/framework docs (no key for basic use; optional CONTEXT7_API_KEY for higher limits).

searxng._what: Self-hosted unlimited meta-search. Requires a local SearXNG (Docker) on :8888 with JSON format enabled. The installer can spin it up.

jina._what: Jina Reader — URL → clean markdown (generous free tier, no key). Verify the current endpoint at https://jina.ai before enabling.
